description: Letter from Bū Manṣūr b. Abū Saʿd Shemuel to Avraham al-Maḥallī al-Talmid (the student/scholar). Addressed to Fustat, the synagogue of the Palestinians, situated in Zuqāq Khabīṣa. The letter consists entirely of well wishes and greetings for the holiday. Sending regards: the children, Sitt Rayḥān, Najmiyya, Thanāʾ, ʿAfīf. Regards to (among others): Yosef b. Abū ʿImrān and his mother and brother-in-law and wife, and Rabbenu Yeḥezqel ha-Dayyan ha-Gadol. (Information in part from CUDL and Goitein's index cards.) VMR. ASE.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
